texto: One of the most extraordinary and all-encompassing forms of communication is music. It reaches places that all kinds of other things cannot reach. I'll put my cards on the table: I think it is our greatest language.

texto: American economists can't understand the German fear of inflation and the effects of inflation when dealing with the world economic crisis. They wonder why Germany pursues such a different course - 'Why can't they agree with us?' I would have thought it was fairly obvious.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Simon Rattle que provoca enfrentar incertezas com ação. Ao questionar “American economists can't understand the German fear of inflation and the effects of inflation wh…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre coragem, american, thought, com foco em thought e world.
